---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What part of the system does this affect?**
<!-- e.g. log classifier, AI agent, install.sh, process manager adapter, health check -->

**Use case**
What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

**Proposed approach**
How would you implement this? Is it a new `.env.watchdog` config key? A new file?

**Does this require a new dependency?**
<!-- New npm or pip packages need discussion before approval — see CONTRIBUTING.md -->

**Have you tested a prototype?**
